name: 1 Channel Zigbee Retrofit Relay

description.consumer:
Your switch. Smarter.

The Retrofit Relay fits quietly behind your existing wall switch and gives it a new intelligence — responding to your schedule, your voice, or your app. Nothing on your wall changes. Everything about how it works does.
description.technical:
A single-channel Zigbee switching relay designed to retrofit any standard mechanical switch into a smart switch — no rewiring, no hardware replacement.

Installs behind the existing wall switch in a flush box or on DIN rail. Supports direct load switching up to 4A; for loads between 4A and 10A, an external relay, SSR, or contactor is required. Communicates natively over Zigbee 3.0 with full Home Assistant support, and integrates with Matter and Apple HomeKit via a compatible hub.

Key Specifications
- Channels: 1
- Max Switching: 10A
- Direct Load: Up to 4A
- Protocol: Zigbee 3.0
- Compatible with: Home Assistant (native), Matter & Apple HomeKit (via hub)
- Installation: Flush box or DIN rail

⚠ For loads above 4A, an external relay, SSR, or contactor is required.

specs.summary: Voltage: 90–250V AC | Max Current: 10A | Wireless Protocol: Zigbee 3.0 | Operating Temperature: -10°C to +40°C | Max Case Temperature (Tc): +80°C | Wireless Range: ≤200m (open field) | Dimensions: 52 × 47 × 18 mm | IP Rating: IP20 | Installation Type: Behind Switch / DIN Rail
specs.compatibility: Home Assistant (native), Matter & Apple HomeKit (via hub)

limitations: For loads above 4A use external relay / SSR / contactor
